title.en: TICKET-ISSUING APPARATUS; FARE-REGISTERING APPARATUS; FRANKING APPARATUS
Machines for printing and issuing tickets (printing mechanisms per se B41; output mechanisms of digital computers G06C11/00)
employing selectable printing plates
without selectable printing plates
portable
Machines for issuing preprinted tickets
from stock in wound strip form
from a stack
Details of, or auxiliary devices for, ticket-issuing machines (for validating inserted tickets G07B11/02)
for cutting-off or separating tickets
for recording or registering tickets issued
for preventing fraudulent operation
for avoiding incorrect action of the machine
allowing manual writing on the tickets
Holders providing direct manual access to the tickets
Ticket punches (perforating pliers B26F1/36; marking record carriers in digital fashion by punching G06K1/02)
Toy ticket-punches
Apparatus for validating or cancelling issued tickets
for validating inserted tickets
for cancelling tickets
Taximeters (measuring distance travelled G01C; measuring time G04)
{operating mechanically}
Details; Accessories

Arrangements or apparatus for collecting fares, tolls or entrance fees at one or more control points (handling coins or valuable papers, e.g. banknotes, G07D; apparatus for vending or hiring articles or services activated by coins, credit cards, paper currency or the like G07F7/00, G07F17/00)

taking into account a variable factor such as distance or time, e.g. for passenger transport, parking systems or car rental systems (G07B15/06 takes precedence; taximeters G07B13/00; parking meters per se G07F17/24)
Arrangements for road pricing or congestion charging of vehicles or vehicle users, e.g. automatic toll systems
Franking apparatus (printing aspects B41)
{operated by portable carriers, e.g. for inputting credit or information}
{Relations between apparatus, e.g. franking machine at customer or apparatus at post office, in a franking system}

{Details internally of apparatus in a franking system, e.g. franking machine at customer or apparatus at post office (digital data processing G06F; coin-freed apparatus for franking per se G07F17/26)}
{Details relating to mailpieces in a franking system}
{Cryptography or similar special procedures in a franking system}
{using mechanical accounting means}
{with means for resetting the monetary value of the accounting means}
with means for computing or counting {(G07B17/00975 takes precedence)}
with means for avoiding misuse
